title: Investigation of Novel Pulse Formation Techniques on the Thermal- Electrochemical Performance of LiFePO4/C Lithium-Ion Batteries
authors: Jiangyun Zhang, Mo Zhang, Haojie Fan, Guoqing Zhang and Chou Mo
abstract: Formation is a critical manufacturing process for lithium-ion batteries, significantly influencing the formation of the solid electrolyte interphase (SEI) and the subsequent electrochemical and thermal performance of the cells. However, conventional constant-current formation often leads to non-uniform SEI growth and poor temperature consistency. In this work, a novel pulse formation strategy is proposed for LiFePO4/C lithium-ion batteries. The effects of pulse formation on electrochemical performance were evaluated through charge–discharge cycling and rate capability tests. In addition, tempe…
